hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
accommodation_name_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation': accommodation_name_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=({"Four Points by Sheraton Chengdu High-tech Zone Exhibition Center"}<=accommodation_name_set)
result_list.append(result)
inner_city_transportation_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    inner_city_transportation_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(inner_city_transportation_cost<=350)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language:
We are a group of 5, traveling from Chongqing to Chengdu for 5 days. We need to meet at least one of the following requirements:
1. Stay at Four Points by Sheraton Chengdu High-tech Zone Exhibition Center
2. City transportation budget is 350.0
